appendix.title: Changes From Previous Version
appendix.para: (This appendix does not form an integral part of this Specification and is informational.)
This is to facilitate human tracking of changes between XLIFF Versions &version; and &pversion;.

para.emphasis: < Work in progress: XLIFF &version; is still under development by the OASIS XLIFF TC. The list below reflects known changes so far and is not yet final. >

appendix.para: In spite of the above mentioned changes, fixes, clarifications, and additions, the practical workings of the previous versions of the XLIFF Core have not been affected.
All valid XLIFF 2.0, 2.1, and 2.2 files are valid XLIFF &version; files. The changes introduced in version &version; are designed to maintain compatibility with versions 2.0, 2.1, and &pversion;.
